title: Atlas Opens the Way Forward
description: On pages 7–9, this part focuses on Unknown person #7, Jinbe, Unknown person #8, Unknown person #9, Kizaru, Luffy as The Straw Hats, Bonney, giants, Vegapunk satellites, and the Iron Giant struggle to escape while the Five Elders press the island from every direction.
scene: The Straw Hats, Bonney, giants, Vegapunk satellites, and the Iron Giant struggle to escape while the Five Elders press the island from every direction.

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #7
dialogue.text: We're here!! Get ready to set sail!!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: Hurry!! We can't hold 'em back much longer!!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #7
dialogue.text: Sink that ancient ship of theirs!!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: Remember, it's just one vessel, even if it does look like it came right out of a legend!!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #7
dialogue.text: Launch the ship already!! We'll jump on!!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #7
dialogue.text: Our signal isn't getting through all this!!!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: There's no mistaking that loud voice of his!!!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: SET SAIL!! TURN THE SHIP AND LET'S GET OUTTA HERE!!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: These pirates are from over a hundred years ago!! Don't be scared of Fossils like them!!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: Gya Gya Gya Gya Gya Gya Gya Gya Gya Gya Gya Gya Gya ~!!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: Fall back!! Get all the remaining ships in formation!!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: YOU'RE ALL MEANT TO BE PARAGONS OF JUSTICE, REMEMBER?

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: DON'T SETTLE FOR BEING ANOTHER FACE IN THE CROWD: STOP UP AND BE A STAR!!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: Woah!! She punched a hole in the hull!!

dialogue.speaker: Luffy
dialogue.text: AND I'M GONNA PUNCH ONE IN YOU!!

summary: This part advances the Escape from Egghead through 37 cleaned dialogue beats, centering the emotional stakes, battle movement, and the wider consequences of Egghead.
